observations.polarity: Cool dawn vs. Pressing midmorning heat
observations.summary: The passage contrasts the coolness of dawn with the intense heat of midmorning, highlighting a shift in environmental conditions that affects the character physically.

left_evidence.quote: By midmorning, the cool of dawn was a distant memory

right_evidence.quote: replaced by the thick, pressing heat that made the air shimmer and dance above the road

bridge_evidence.quote: The sun rose higher, and with it came the heat
